log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Fairy — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Fairy — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:7+3=10 vs AC 14] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Fairy — Winged Striker.
→ Fairy — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Fairy — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

→ melee_spell attack: [d20:12+3=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 8casting_mod force damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: NaN/67
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Fairy — Winged Striker.
→ Fairy — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:7+6=13 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Fairy — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
